headline: Vonage and ServiceNow Expand their Partnership
summary: HOLMDEL, N.J., March 24, 2026--Vonage, part of Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC), today announced the launch of its native integration with ServiceNow Voice, built on the ServiceNow AI Platform, embedding enterprise-grade voice and real-time AI capabilities directly into ServiceNow Customer Service Management (CSM) and IT Service Management (ITSM) workflows for Vonage Contact Center (VCC) customers.
